//latex: LaTeX Workshop intentionally defers to the GLOBAL 'latexmk-icloud-safe' recipe in the user settings.json. Do NOT define 'latex-workshop.latex.recipes'/'.tools' here: a workspace array override replaces (not merges) the global list, which removes 'latexmk-icloud-safe' from the recipe set while it is still the forced default -> 'Failed to resolve build recipe' error. The global recipe cd's into %DIR% and passes only the basename, so it is already iCloud-spaced-path safe.
